description_long: This lamp features a minimalist, modern design with a flat, circular base that provides stability. A single, straight vertical stem rises from the center of the base and transitions into a right-angled arm, supporting a rectangular, box-shaped lamp head. The entire structure is finished in a uniform matte black color, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. The lamp head is solid and likely houses an integrated light source, with no visible switches or decorative embellishments. Its geometric form and clean lines suggest it is designed for functional, task-oriented lighting, suitable for urban environments. The overall construction appears robust, with all components made from metal or a similar hard material.
description: A modern, matte black lamp with a circular base, straight stem, and rectangular lamp head, featuring a minimalist geometric design. The lamp is sturdy and functional, ideal for urban or contemporary settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat, circular base, straight vertical stem, and the rectangular lamp head aligned horizontally.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the right-angled arm and the boxy lamp head extending outward from the stem.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the straight stem and the back of the rectangular lamp head, with the base fully visible.
description_view_3: Opposite angled view showing the arm's extension and the lamp head's geometric shape from the other side.
